name: De Minimis Exception for Gift Loans

eligibility.description: Aggregate outstanding loans between the individuals must not exceed $10,000 and the loan cannot be used to purchase income-producing assets.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows individuals to make below-market interest rate loans to other individuals without triggering imputed interest income or gift tax consequences if the total loan amount is $10,000 or less.
